title: Doing The Impossible - Copper Plating Aluminium
description:
This can be used to passivate the aluminium so it can be used as a current collector in supercapacitors.
If you like the channel and want to help you can always donate here
https://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/donations/
 the exact recipe is 2.4 g sodium molybdate, 100mL DI water, 100mL of 5% acetic acid, 1g Lithium or sodium fluoride, 2 mL concentrated phosphoric acid
